evaluation_method: LLM-as-judge (Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct, ~95% human agreement). Three tasks: PreciseWikiQA (False Refusal Rate, Hallucination Rate, Correct Answer Rate), LongWiki (Precision, Recall@K, F1@K via claim decomposition), NonExistentEntities (False Acceptance Rate).
metric: Per-task: Hallucination Rate, F1@K, False Acceptance Rate
